name: InstantMesh
description: Multi-view 3D mesh generation. Give it one image and it internally generates 6 consistent views to reconstruct a detailed textured mesh.
author: Lightning Pixel

params_schema.label: Quality
params_schema.tooltip: Large gives better geometry detail. Base is faster on low VRAM.

params_schema.label: Diffusion Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Steps used by the Zero123++ multi-view diffusion stage.

params_schema.label: Texture Map
params_schema.tooltip: Export a proper UV texture map. Disable for faster vertex-color only output.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Change the seed if the result is unsatisfying.
